userdata:
#!/bin/bash
set -x
# backstop self-terminate (parachute) in case the explicit teardown ever fails
shutdown -h +30 &
RESULT=/tmp/result.json
echo '{"job":"sapphire-qmodels-smoke-467d2efe","kind":"smoke","ran":true,"host":"'$(hostname)'","ts":"'$(date -u +%FT%TZ)'"}' > $RESULT
aws s3 cp $RESULT s3://sapphire-qmodels-scratch/sapphire-qmodels-smoke-467d2efe/result.json --region us-east-1 || true
# done — terminate now (initiated-shutdown-behavior=terminate makes this a terminate)
shutdown -h now
